_comment: Wavetable preset test catalog: a generic host (aap-core aaphostsample, which attaches a native client) + the wavetable plugin. The plugin runs in its own service process; the preset-select abort is in THAT service, so validating the fix needs the wavetable APK rebuilt against an aap-core with the AudioPluginService Looper.prepare() fix (drop it into .work/local/aap-juce-wavetable.apk). The host (aaphostsample) does not need the fix.
name: wavetable-ci
